name: Post Ranch Inn
verdict: A draft canonical record for the kind of high-confidence place card this guide should render.
rationale: Use this record to capture the editorial reason a place belongs in a guide, separated from the Ghost prose around it.
caveats: Needs editorial review before this should be treated as a final public recommendation.
evidence: Seeded as an MVP content structure example.
